channel.title: Dark Knight on Aaditya Maheshwari
channel.description: Recent content in Dark Knight on Aaditya Maheshwari

item.title: Just Words
item.description: Some words, some lines. Up to you what you make of them. Energy follows thought. Actions express priorities. He is able who thinks he is able. All humans die. But few have lived. Life is either a daring adventure or nothing. It’s not what you are underneath, it’s what you do that defines you. Pain & ecstasy come hand in hand. How will you use your gifts? What choices will you make?
